name: Liz's Chocolate Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
In a large bowl, beat together the sugar, oil, and eggs. Add vanilla and zucchini; mix well.
In another bowl, whisk together flour, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
Alternate adding the dry ingredients and milk to the zucchini mixture, stirring until just combined.
Pour batter into a greased 10-inch tube or Bundt pan.
Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool for 10 minutes before removing from the pan.
For frosting: Beat cream cheese and butter until smooth. Stir in vanilla, then add confectioners' sugar and milk; mix until creamy. Spread over cooled cake and sprinkle with nuts.
